Very disappointing experience. I ordered Chicken Chilly from Prathamesh Rolls, but the delivery status kept showing "10 minutes away" for over 30 minutes. Due to the unnecessary delay, I cancelled the order, yet Swiggy charged the full ₹159 as a cancellation fee. It's unfair to make customers pay the entire amount when the delay is on the platform's side. Swiggy should have a fair cancellation policy for delayed orders.

I accidentally placed a ₹249 food order on Swiggy and requested cancellation immediately. However, customer support did not respond properly. When the delivery partner arrived, I refused the order and asked him to cancel it, but he told me to contact customer care. Later, customer support informed me that I would have to pay a cancellation penalty on my next order. I don't understand why I should be charged when I canceled the order immediately. This was a very disappointing experience.
